_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: we created isogenic MPM and breast cancer cell lines by ectopically expressing full-length NF2 fused to GFP. Merlin expression was confirmed by Western blot analysis
details: Successfully expressed full-length NF2 fused to GFP in MM87 MPM cells and MDA-MB-231 breast cancer cells, confirmed by Western blot
